title: helichrysum obcordatum subsp. majus
intro: Helichrysum obcordatum subsp. majus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum obcordatum subsp. majus lie in its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum obcordatum subsp. majus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
